title: PokéAPI Resource Identity, URL Construction, Pagination, and Fair Use · Execution Trace: Pokedex Go Path Query Encoding
summary: The client concatenates user input into arbitrary URLs, treats list and detail resources alike, ignores pagination links, and sends repeated requests despite the API fair-use cache request. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go path query encoding increment in fixed-origin PokéAPI resource and fair-use policy. Learners progress th…
objectives: Construct path segments and limit or offset queries with net/url while rejecting slash, control, and oversized input.
Distinguish resource type, numeric ID, canonical lowercase name, list query, and response self URL without unsafe equivalence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
